name: Code Review Pipeline
description: Three-step code review: analyze code, write a report, suggest fixes.
goal: Perform a thorough code review of the target project

variables.name: focus
variables.default: bugs, style issues, and potential improvements

nodes.name: Analyze Code
nodes.prompt: Analyze the code in the working directory. Focus on {{var:focus}}. List every issue you find with file paths and line numbers.

nodes.name: Write Report
Suggest Fixes
